zh.lifeSummary: Walter Ddu是William Ddu的兒子，出生。他和Mrs Ddu至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Walter Ddu是William Ddu的儿子，出生。他和Mrs Ddu至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Ddu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: West African (Nigeria): from the Yoruba personal name Adú, originally a nickname from a dú ‘that has a very dark complexion’.
West African (Ghana): from an Akan male personal name of unexplained etymology.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: Walter Ddu was born as the son of William Ddu. He had at least 1 daughter with Mrs Ddu.

fr.lifeSummary: Walter Ddu est né, fils de William Ddu. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Mrs Ddu.

de.lifeSummary: Walter Ddu wurde, als Sohn von William Ddu geboren. Er hatte mit Mrs Ddu mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Walter Ddu è nato il come figlio di William Ddu. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Mrs Ddu.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter DduはWilliam Dduの息子として生まれた。彼はMrs Dduとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Ddu(은)는 William Ddu의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mrs Ddu(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Walter Ddu nasceu filho de William Ddu. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Mrs Ddu.

ru.lifeSummary: Walter Ddu родился. Его отца звали William Ddu. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Mrs Ddu.

es.lifeSummary: Walter Ddu nació como hijo de William Ddu. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Mrs Ddu.
